title: 1.1: Removes string quotes from all 5 scapy.fields.Field type annotations across Packet_metaclass.__new__ (current_fld, resolved_fld, final_fld), Packet_metaclass.__getattr__, and Field_metaclass.__new__ in scapy/base_classes.py
1.2: Renames the AutoConnection.CSPECversion field to AutoConnection.version in scapy/contrib/homeplugav.py
1.3: Renames the ModulePIB.reserved_21 field to ModulePIB.reserved_21b in scapy/contrib/homeplugav.py
1.4: Renames the second duplicate ForceRejoinReq.RFU field to ForceRejoinReq.RFU2 in scapy/contrib/loraphy2wan.py
1.5: Consolidates the duplicate ProfinetDCP.name_of_station conditional fields into a single field in scapy/contrib/pnio_dcp.py
1.6: Consolidates the duplicate VQPEntry data conditional fields into a single multi-type field in scapy/contrib/vqp.py
1.7: Corrects the VQPEntry.datatom typo to VQPEntry.data in scapy/contrib/vqp.py
1.8: Updates the VQPEntry FieldLenField to auto-compute length with length_of='data' and fmt='H' in scapy/contrib/vqp.py
1.9: Removes the custom VQPEntry.post_build() method in scapy/contrib/vqp.py
1.10: Corrects the UDP-to-VQP layer bindings so single-direction ports dissect without adding default fields when building in scapy/contrib/vqp.py
1.11: Adds a graceful failure with a print statement and SystemExit when running root tests on Windows without libpcap in scapy/tools/UTscapy.py
4.1: Removes the ProfinetDCP.name_of_station or VQPEntry.data fields entirely instead of consolidating them
4.2: Omits the WINDOWS platform check for the libpcap requirement in scapy/tools/UTscapy.py, applying the exit globally
